extract: Frenzy Plant (Japanese: ハードプラント Hard Plant) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation III. It is TM155 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet and TM160 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. Along with Blast Burn and Hydro Cannon, Frenzy Plant is one of the ultimate moves. All fully evolved Grass-type first partner Pokémon can learn this move.
